interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which airports are located in cities with a population greater than 200,000?
interactions.intention: Find airports in cities where the population exceeds 200,000.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_AIRPORT.NAME, MONDIAL_AIRPORT.IATACODE FROM MONDIAL_AIRPORT JOIN MONDIAL_CITY ON MONDIAL_AIRPORT.CITY = MONDIAL_CITY.NAME WHERE MONDIAL_CITY.POPULATION > 200000

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the elevation levels of these airports?
interactions.intention: Get the elevation levels of the airports found earlier.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, ELEVATION FROM MONDIAL_AIRPORT WHERE CITY IN (SELECT NAME FROM MONDIAL_CITY WHERE POPULATION > 200000)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Do any of these airports belong to an island?
interactions.intention: Check if the airports from earlier are located on islands.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_AIRPORT.NAME FROM MONDIAL_AIRPORT JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_ISLAND ON MONDIAL_AIRPORT.ISLAND = MONDIAL_GEO_ISLAND.ISLAND WHERE MONDIAL_AIRPORT.CITY IN (SELECT NAME FROM MONDIAL_CITY WHERE POPULATION > 200000)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the population of cities in 2011?
interactions.intention: Find the population of cities for the year 2011.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT CITY, POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_CITYPOPS WHERE YEAR = 2011

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you compare these city populations with the population of their provinces?
interactions.intention: Compare city populations with their respective province populations.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT M.CITY, M.POPULATION AS CITY_POPULATION, P.POPULATION AS PROVINCE_POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_CITYPOPS M JOIN MONDIAL_PROVINCE P ON M.PROVINCE = P.NAME AND M.COUNTRY = P.COUNTRY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: How do these compare against the total country populations?
interactions.intention: Compare city and province populations against the total population of their countries.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT M.CITY, M.POPULATION AS CITY_POPULATION, P.POPULATION AS PROVINCE_POPULATION, C.POPULATION AS COUNTRY_POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_CITYPOPS M JOIN MONDIAL_PROVINCE P ON M.PROVINCE = P.NAME AND M.COUNTRY = P.COUNTRY JOIN MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS C ON M.COUNTRY = C.COUNTRY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the total area covered by all continents?
interactions.intention: Find the total area covered by all continents.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT SUM(AREA) AS TOTAL_AREA FROM MONDIAL_CONTINENT

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which continent has the largest area?
interactions.intention: Identify the continent with the largest area.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME FROM MONDIAL_CONTINENT WHERE AREA = (SELECT MAX(AREA) FROM MONDIAL_CONTINENT)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the GDP of countries in the continent with the largest area?
interactions.intention: Find the GDP of countries in the continent that has the largest area.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_ECONOMY.COUNTRY, MONDIAL_ECONOMY.GDP FROM MONDIAL_ECONOMY JOIN MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES ON MONDIAL_ECONOMY.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES.COUNTRY JOIN MONDIAL_CONTINENT ON MONDIAL_CONTINENT.NAME = MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES.CONTINENT WHERE MONDIAL_CONTINENT.AREA = (SELECT MAX(AREA) FROM MONDIAL_CONTINENT)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you give me details of all the deserts sorted by their area?
interactions.intention: List all deserts sorted by their area.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, AREA FROM MONDIAL_DESERT ORDER BY AREA DESC

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which provinces and countries are associated with these deserts?
interactions.intention: Find the provinces and countries associated with the deserts.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT.DESERT, MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT.PROVINCE, MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT.COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT INNER JOIN MONDIAL_DESERT ON MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT.DESERT = MONDIAL_DESERT.NAME

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Could you also provide the alternative names of the provinces linked to these deserts?
interactions.intention: Get alternative names of provinces linked to the deserts.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT.DESERT, MONDIAL_PROVINCEOTHERNAME.OTHERNAME FROM MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT INNER JOIN MONDIAL_DESERT ON MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT.DESERT = MONDIAL_DESERT.NAME INNER JOIN MONDIAL_PROVINCEOTHERNAME ON MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT.PROVINCE = MONDIAL_PROVINCEOTHERNAME.PROVINCE AND MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_PROVINCEOTHERNAME.COUNTRY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the percentages of different ethnic groups in a country?
interactions.intention: Find the percentages of different ethnic groups in a specified country.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, PERCENTAGE FROM MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you also tell me the population growth for countries with a high percentage of European ethnic group?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the population growth for countries where the European ethnic group has a high percentage.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT M2.POPULATION_GROWTH FROM MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP M1 JOIN MONDIAL_POPULATION M2 ON M1.COUNTRY = M2.COUNTRY WHERE M1.NAME = 'European' AND M1.PERCENTAGE > 30

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the percentage of Vietnamese ethnic group in these countries?
interactions.intention: Find the percentage of Vietnamese ethnic group in the previously mentioned countries.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT PERCENTAGE FROM MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP WHERE NAME = 'Vietnamese'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the provinces where the rivers listed in the estuary data originate?
interactions.intention: Find the provinces of origin for rivers listed in the estuary data.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_GEO_SOURCE.PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_SOURCE ON MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY.RIVER = MONDIAL_GEO_SOURCE.RIVER

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which countries do these rivers pass through, based on the river data?
interactions.intention: Find the countries these rivers pass through based on the river data.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_GEO_RIVER.COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_RIVER ON MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY.RIVER = MONDIAL_GEO_RIVER.RIVER

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you list the provinces where these rivers pass through, as per the source data?
interactions.intention: List the provinces where these rivers pass through, as per the source data.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_GEO_SOURCE.PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_SOURCE ON MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY.RIVER = MONDIAL_GEO_SOURCE.RIVER

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the names and elevations of mountains along with the islands they are located on?
interactions.intention: I want to know the names and elevations of mountains and the islands they are located on.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MG.MOUNTAIN, MM.ELEVATION, MI.ISLAND FROM MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN MG JOIN MONDIAL_MOUNTAIN MM ON MG.MOUNTAIN = MM.NAME JOIN MONDIAL_MOUNTAINONISLAND MI ON MG.MOUNTAIN = MI.MOUNTAIN

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the provinces these mountains belong to?
interactions.intention: Can you provide the provinces where these mountains are located?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which of these mountains have an elevation greater than 1500?
interactions.intention: I want to find out which mountains have an elevation greater than 1500.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MG.MOUNTAIN FROM MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN MG JOIN MONDIAL_MOUNTAIN MM ON MG.MOUNTAIN = MM.NAME WHERE MM.ELEVATION > 1500

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me about the lakes along with their countries and provinces?
interactions.intention: Provide a geographical overview of lakes, their countries, and provinces.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT LAKE, COUNTRY, PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Are there any islands located in lakes?
interactions.intention: Identify islands that are located in lakes.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_ISLANDIN.ISLAND FROM MONDIAL_ISLANDIN JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE ON MONDIAL_ISLANDIN.LAKE = MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE.LAKE

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you also check if any rivers are connected to those lakes?
interactions.intention: Find rivers that are connected to the lakes.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_RIVER.NAME FROM MONDIAL_RIVER JOIN MONDIAL_ISLANDIN ON MONDIAL_ISLANDIN.RIVER = MONDIAL_RIVER.NAME JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE ON MONDIAL_ISLANDIN.LAKE = MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE.LAKE

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the types of organizations associated with countries?
interactions.intention: Find the types of organizations linked to countries.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT TYPE FROM MONDIAL_ISMEMBER

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which specific countries are signatories?
interactions.intention: Identify countries that are signatories.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_ISMEMBER WHERE TYPE = 'signatory'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the organizations these signatory countries belong to?
interactions.intention: Find the organizations that the signatory countries are part of.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MI.COUNTRY, MO.NAME FROM MONDIAL_ISMEMBER MI JOIN MONDIAL_ORGANIZATION MO ON MI.ORGANIZATION = MO.ABBREVIATION WHERE MI.TYPE = 'signatory'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which cities in the database have a population greater than 150,000?
interactions.intention: Find cities with a population greater than 150,000.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME FROM MONDIAL_CITY WHERE POPULATION > 150000

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the elevation of these cities?
interactions.intention: Find the elevation of cities with a population greater than 150,000.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, ELEVATION FROM MONDIAL_CITY WHERE POPULATION > 150000

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Do any of these cities have alternative names listed in the database?
interactions.intention: Check if cities with a population greater than 150,000 have alternative names in the database.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MC.NAME, MCO.OTHERNAME FROM MONDIAL_CITY MC JOIN MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME MCO ON MC.NAME = MCO.CITY WHERE MC.POPULATION > 150000

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the names of the seas merged with the Andaman Sea?
interactions.intention: Find the seas that merge with the Andaman Sea.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT SEA2 FROM MONDIAL_MERGESWITH WHERE SEA1 = 'Andaman Sea'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you provide the names of the seas that merge with the Indian Ocean?
interactions.intention: Get the seas that merge with the Indian Ocean.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT SEA2 FROM MONDIAL_MERGESWITH WHERE SEA1 = 'Indian Ocean'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the areas of the seas that merge with the Andaman Sea?
interactions.intention: Find the areas of the seas that merge with the Andaman Sea.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_SEA.AREA FROM MONDIAL_MERGESWITH JOIN MONDIAL_SEA ON MONDIAL_MERGESWITH.SEA2 = MONDIAL_SEA.NAME WHERE MONDIAL_MERGESWITH.SEA1 = 'Andaman Sea'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which two countries share the longest border?
interactions.intention: Find the two countries that share the longest border.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNTRY1, COUNTRY2, LENGTH FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS WHERE LENGTH = (SELECT MAX(LENGTH) FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the GDP of the countries sharing that longest border?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the GDP of the countries that share the longest border.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT E1.GDP AS GDP_COUNTRY1, E2.GDP AS GDP_COUNTRY2 FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS B JOIN MONDIAL_ECONOMY E1 ON B.COUNTRY1 = E1.COUNTRY JOIN MONDIAL_ECONOMY E2 ON B.COUNTRY2 = E2.COUNTRY WHERE B.LENGTH = (SELECT MAX(LENGTH) FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the unemployment rates of those countries?
interactions.intention: Find the unemployment rates of the countries that share the longest border.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT E1.UNEMPLOYMENT AS UNEMPLOYMENT_COUNTRY1, E2.UNEMPLOYMENT AS UNEMPLOYMENT_COUNTRY2 FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS B JOIN MONDIAL_ECONOMY E1 ON B.COUNTRY1 = E1.COUNTRY JOIN MONDIAL_ECONOMY E2 ON B.COUNTRY2 = E2.COUNTRY WHERE B.LENGTH = (SELECT MAX(LENGTH) FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the area of the Kalahari desert?
interactions.intention: Find out the area of the Kalahari desert.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT AREA FROM MONDIAL_DESERT WHERE NAME = 'Kalahari'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which country and province is the Kalahari desert located in?
interactions.intention: Find out the country and province where the Kalahari desert is located.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNTRY, PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT INNER JOIN MONDIAL_DESERT ON MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT.DESERT = MONDIAL_DESERT.NAME WHERE MONDIAL_DESERT.NAME = 'Kalahari'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the population of that province?
interactions.intention: Find out the population of the province where the Kalahari desert is located.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_PROVPOPS INNER JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT ON MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT.PROVINCE = MONDIAL_PROVPOPS.PROVINCE AND MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_PROVPOPS.COUNTRY WHERE MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT.DESERT = 'Kalahari'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the alternative names of cities along with their countries and provinces?
interactions.intention: Find alternative names of cities along with their respective countries and provinces.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_CITY.NAME, MONDIAL_CITY.COUNTRY, MONDIAL_CITY.PROVINCE, MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.OTHERNAME FROM MONDIAL_CITY JOIN MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME ON MONDIAL_CITY.NAME = MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.CITY AND MONDIAL_CITY.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.COUNTRY AND MONDIAL_CITY.PROVINCE = MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.PROVINCE

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me which cities are located on islands, along with their provinces and countries?
interactions.intention: Find cities located on islands along with their provinces and countries.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_CITY.NAME, MONDIAL_CITY.COUNTRY, MONDIAL_CITY.PROVINCE, MONDIAL_LOCATEDON.ISLAND FROM MONDIAL_CITY JOIN MONDIAL_LOCATEDON ON MONDIAL_CITY.NAME = MONDIAL_LOCATEDON.CITY AND MONDIAL_CITY.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_LOCATEDON.COUNTRY AND MONDIAL_CITY.PROVINCE = MONDIAL_LOCATEDON.PROVINCE

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: For cities with alternative names, are there any that are also located on islands?
interactions.intention: Find cities with alternative names that are also located on islands.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_CITY.NAME, MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.OTHERNAME, MONDIAL_LOCATEDON.ISLAND FROM MONDIAL_CITY JOIN MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME ON MONDIAL_CITY.NAME = MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.CITY AND MONDIAL_CITY.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.COUNTRY AND MONDIAL_CITY.PROVINCE = MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.PROVINCE JOIN MONDIAL_LOCATEDON ON MONDIAL_CITY.NAME = MONDIAL_LOCATEDON.CITY AND MONDIAL_CITY.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_LOCATEDON.COUNTRY AND MONDIAL_CITY.PROVINCE = MONDIAL_LOCATEDON.PROVINCE

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the GDP of each country?
interactions.intention: Get the GDP values for all countries.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNTRY, GDP FROM MONDIAL_ECONOMY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you also provide the unemployment rates for these countries?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the unemployment rates for the previously mentioned countries.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNTRY, UNEMPLOYMENT FROM MONDIAL_ECONOMY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which mountains are located in the same countries as the ones we discussed?
interactions.intention: Find the mountains located in the countries mentioned earlier.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT M.MOUNTAIN, M.COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN M JOIN MONDIAL_ECONOMY E ON M.COUNTRY = E.COUNTRY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the total area of all continents listed?
interactions.intention: Find the total area of all continents.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT SUM(AREA) AS TOTAL_AREA FROM MONDIAL_CONTINENT

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which continents are associated with countries and their respective percentages?
interactions.intention: Find the continents along with the countries and their respective percentages.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MC.NAME AS CONTINENT_NAME, ME.COUNTRY, ME.PERCENTAGE FROM MONDIAL_CONTINENT MC JOIN MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES ME ON MC.NAME = ME.CONTINENT

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Among the listed continents, which one has the smallest area?
interactions.intention: Find the continent with the smallest area.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME FROM MONDIAL_CONTINENT ORDER BY AREA ASC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the names and IATA codes of all airports in the Czech Republic?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the names and IATA codes of airports located in the Czech Republic.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, IATACODE FROM MONDIAL_AIRPORT WHERE COUNTRY = 'CZ'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the elevation of these airports?
interactions.intention: Get the elevation of the airports in the Czech Republic mentioned earlier.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, ELEVATION FROM MONDIAL_AIRPORT WHERE COUNTRY = 'CZ'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Are there any islands associated with the provinces of these airports?
interactions.intention: Find the islands that are associated with the provinces of airports in the Czech Republic.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MONDIAL_GEO_ISLAND.ISLAND FROM MONDIAL_AIRPORT JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_ISLAND ON MONDIAL_AIRPORT.PROVINCE = MONDIAL_GEO_ISLAND.PROVINCE WHERE MONDIAL_AIRPORT.COUNTRY = 'CZ'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the names and locations (latitude and longitude) of all airports?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the names and locations (latitude and longitude) of all airports.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, LATITUDE, LONGITUDE FROM MONDIAL_AIRPORT

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which islands do these airports belong to, along with their countries?
interactions.intention: Find out the islands and countries to which the airports belong.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MA.NAME, MA.ISLAND, MA.COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_AIRPORT MA JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_ISLAND MG ON MA.ISLAND = MG.ISLAND

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you also provide the bordering country for the airports' countries?
interactions.intention: List the bordering countries for the countries where the airports are located.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MA.NAME, MB.COUNTRY2 FROM MONDIAL_AIRPORT MA JOIN MONDIAL_BORDERS MB ON MA.COUNTRY = MB.COUNTRY1

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the population of cities in the provinces of a specific country, like Germany?
interactions.intention: Find the population of cities in provinces of a specific country, such as Germany.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_CITYPOPS.CITY, MONDIAL_CITYPOPS.POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_CITYPOPS JOIN MONDIAL_PROVINCE ON MONDIAL_CITYPOPS.PROVINCE = MONDIAL_PROVINCE.NAME WHERE MONDIAL_CITYPOPS.COUNTRY = 'D';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which city had the highest population in the year 2011?
interactions.intention: Identify the city with the highest population in the year 2011.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT CITY, MAX(POPULATION) FROM MONDIAL_CITYPOPS WHERE YEAR = 2011 GROUP BY CITY ORDER BY MAX(POPULATION) DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY;

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the total population of all provinces in Denmark?
interactions.intention: Find the total population of all provinces in Denmark.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT SUM(POPULATION) FROM MONDIAL_PROVINCE WHERE COUNTRY = 'DK';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which two countries share the longest border?
interactions.intention: Identify the two countries that share the longest border.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNTRY1, COUNTRY2, LENGTH FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS WHERE LENGTH = (SELECT MAX(LENGTH) FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you show me all the borders longer than 200 km?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the borders that are longer than 200 kilometers.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNTRY1, COUNTRY2, LENGTH FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS WHERE LENGTH > 200

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the GDP of the countries that share these borders?
interactions.intention: Find the GDP of the countries that share borders longer than 200 kilometers.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT ME.COUNTRY, ME.GDP FROM MONDIAL_ECONOMY ME JOIN MONDIAL_BORDERS MB ON ME.COUNTRY = MB.COUNTRY1 WHERE MB.LENGTH > 200

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the percentage of Pacific Islanders in countries with their population data?
interactions.intention: Find the percentage of Pacific Islanders in countries that have population data.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT ME.NAME, ME.PERCENTAGE FROM MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP ME JOIN MONDIAL_POPULATION MP ON ME.COUNTRY = MP.COUNTRY WHERE ME.NAME = 'Pacific Islander'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the highest percentage among the ethnic groups you just mentioned?
interactions.intention: Find the highest percentage among the Pacific Islander ethnic groups in countries with population data.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MAX(ME.PERCENTAGE) FROM MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP ME WHERE ME.NAME = 'Pacific Islander'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which governments are associated with the countries having the highest percentage from the previous result?
interactions.intention: Find the governments of countries where Pacific Islanders have the highest percentage.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MP.GOVERNMENT FROM MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP ME JOIN MONDIAL_POLITICS MP ON ME.COUNTRY = MP.COUNTRY WHERE ME.NAME = 'Pacific Islander' AND ME.PERCENTAGE = (SELECT MAX(PERCENTAGE) FROM MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP WHERE NAME = 'Pacific Islander')

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which provinces have estuaries in Germany?
interactions.intention: Find the provinces in Germany that have estuaries.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY WHERE COUNTRY = 'D';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you sort those provinces alphabetically?
interactions.intention: Sort the provinces with estuaries in Germany alphabetically.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY WHERE COUNTRY = 'D' ORDER BY PROVINCE;

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which rivers flow into estuaries in those provinces?
interactions.intention: Find the rivers that flow into estuaries in the previously mentioned provinces.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MGE.RIVER FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY MGE JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_RIVER MGR ON MGE.RIVER = MGR.RIVER WHERE MGE.COUNTRY = 'D';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me which islands are located within the lakes listed in the database?
interactions.intention: Find islands that are located within lakes.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_ISLAND.NAME FROM MONDIAL_ISLAND JOIN MONDIAL_ISLANDIN ON MONDIAL_ISLAND.NAME = MONDIAL_ISLANDIN.ISLAND JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE ON MONDIAL_ISLANDIN.LAKE = MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE.LAKE

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you provide details about the lakes that these islands are located in?
interactions.intention: Retrieve details of lakes where the previously mentioned islands are located.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_LAKE.NAME, MONDIAL_LAKE.AREA, MONDIAL_LAKE.ELEVATION FROM MONDIAL_LAKE JOIN MONDIAL_ISLANDIN ON MONDIAL_LAKE.NAME = MONDIAL_ISLANDIN.LAKE JOIN MONDIAL_ISLAND ON MONDIAL_ISLANDIN.ISLAND = MONDIAL_ISLAND.NAME

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: How many lakes are there per province?
interactions.intention: Count the number of lakes in each province.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE.PROVINCE, COUNT(MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE.LAKE) FROM MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE GROUP BY MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE.PROVINCE ORDER BY MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE.PROVINCE ASC

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the names of mountains that are located on islands?
interactions.intention: Find the names of mountains situated on islands.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN.MOUNTAIN FROM MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN JOIN MONDIAL_MOUNTAINONISLAND ON MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN.MOUNTAIN = MONDIAL_MOUNTAINONISLAND.MOUNTAIN

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which islands have mountains located on them, and what are their names?
interactions.intention: Find the names of islands along with the names of mountains located on them.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MONDIAL_MOUNTAINONISLAND.ISLAND, MONDIAL_MOUNTAINONISLAND.MOUNTAIN FROM MONDIAL_MOUNTAINONISLAND JOIN MONDIAL_ISLAND ON MONDIAL_ISLAND.NAME = MONDIAL_MOUNTAINONISLAND.ISLAND

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the elevation of the highest mountain mentioned?
interactions.intention: Find the elevation of the highest mountain from the previously mentioned ones.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MAX(ELEVATION) AS HIGHEST_ELEVATION FROM MONDIAL_MOUNTAIN

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which countries are members of organizations and what are the names of these organizations?
interactions.intention: Find countries and the organizations they are members of.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_ISMEMBER.COUNTRY, MONDIAL_ORGANIZATION.NAME FROM MONDIAL_ISMEMBER JOIN MONDIAL_ORGANIZATION ON MONDIAL_ISMEMBER.ORGANIZATION = MONDIAL_ORGANIZATION.ABBREVIATION

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you also find the languages spoken in these countries?
interactions.intention: Find the languages spoken in the countries that are members of organizations.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_ISMEMBER.COUNTRY, MONDIAL_LANGUAGE.NAME FROM MONDIAL_ISMEMBER JOIN MONDIAL_LANGUAGE ON MONDIAL_LANGUAGE.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_ISMEMBER.COUNTRY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the most common type of membership among the countries?
interactions.intention: Identify the most common membership type among countries.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT TYPE, COUNT(*) AS TYPE_COUNT FROM MONDIAL_ISMEMBER GROUP BY TYPE ORDER BY TYPE_COUNT DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the names of the seas that are listed in the table?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the names of the seas mentioned in the table.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT SEA1, SEA2 FROM MONDIAL_MERGESWITH

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you find information about the depths of these seas?
interactions.intention: Find the depths of the seas mentioned earlier.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT M.SEA1, M.SEA2, S.DEPTH FROM MONDIAL_MERGESWITH M JOIN MONDIAL_SEA S ON M.SEA1 = S.NAME OR M.SEA2 = S.NAME

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which rivers are connected to these seas?
interactions.intention: Identify rivers connected to the earlier mentioned seas.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT R.NAME, R.SEA FROM MONDIAL_RIVER R JOIN MONDIAL_SEA S ON R.SEA = S.NAME JOIN MONDIAL_MERGESWITH M ON M.SEA1 = S.NAME OR M.SEA2 = S.NAME

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the different alternative names of cities in the database?
interactions.intention: List the alternative names of cities.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT OTHERNAME FROM MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which provinces have cities with alternative names?
interactions.intention: Find the provinces with cities that have alternative names.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME WHERE OTHERNAME IS NOT NULL

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the countries of these cities and their official names?
interactions.intention: Find the countries and official names of cities with alternative names.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.COUNTRY, MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.CITY FROM MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME JOIN MONDIAL_COUNTRY ON MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_COUNTRY.CODE

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the total area covered by all continents?
interactions.intention: Find the total area covered by all continents.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT SUM(AREA) FROM MONDIAL_CONTINENT

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the population of countries in Europe?
interactions.intention: Find the population of countries in Europe.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT SUM(MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS.POPULATION) FROM MONDIAL_CONTINENT JOIN MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES ON MONDIAL_CONTINENT.NAME = MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES.CONTINENT JOIN MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS ON MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES.COUNTRY WHERE MONDIAL_CONTINENT.NAME = 'Europe'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What about the population of provinces in Europe?
interactions.intention: Find the population of provinces in Europe.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT SUM(MONDIAL_PROVPOPS.POPULATION) FROM MONDIAL_CONTINENT JOIN MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES ON MONDIAL_CONTINENT.NAME = MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES.CONTINENT JOIN MONDIAL_PROVPOPS ON MONDIAL_PROVPOPS.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES.COUNTRY WHERE MONDIAL_CONTINENT.NAME = 'Europe'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the different ethnic groups and their percentages in the database?
interactions.intention: Retrieve details about ethnic groups and their percentages.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, PERCENTAGE FROM MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you show me the ethnic group with the highest percentage?
interactions.intention: Find the ethnic group with the highest percentage.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, PERCENTAGE FROM MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP ORDER BY PERCENTAGE DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the population growth and infant mortality for the countries with these ethnic groups?
interactions.intention: Retrieve population growth and infant mortality for countries associated with these ethnic groups.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT ME.NAME, MP.POPULATION_GROWTH, MP.INFANT_MORTALITY FROM MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP ME JOIN MONDIAL_POPULATION MP ON ME.COUNTRY = MP.COUNTRY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the provinces listed in the estuary dataset?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the provinces listed in the estuary dataset.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me which rivers are associated with Sachsen-Anhalt?
interactions.intention: Find the rivers that are associated with Sachsen-Anhalt.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT RIVER FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY WHERE PROVINCE = 'Sachsen-Anhalt'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which countries and their governments are linked to the rivers in the estuary dataset?
interactions.intention: Find the countries and their governments associated with the rivers in the estuary dataset.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MPE.COUNTRY, MPE.GOVERNMENT FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY MGE JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_RIVER MGR ON MGE.RIVER = MGR.RIVER JOIN MONDIAL_POLITICS MPE ON MPE.COUNTRY = MGE.COUNTRY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which lakes are located in countries listed in the database?
interactions.intention: Find the lakes located in the countries listed in the database.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE.LAKE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE JOIN MONDIAL_COUNTRY ON MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_COUNTRY.CODE

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me which cities are near those lakes?
interactions.intention: Find the cities located near the lakes identified earlier.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_LOCATED.CITY FROM MONDIAL_LOCATED JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE ON MONDIAL_LOCATED.LAKE = MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE.LAKE

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which of these cities has the largest population?
interactions.intention: Identify the city with the largest population among the ones associated with the lakes.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_COUNTRY.NAME FROM MONDIAL_COUNTRY ORDER BY MONDIAL_COUNTRY.POPULATION DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the areas and depths of seas that are mentioned along with their related seas?
interactions.intention: Provide the areas and depths of seas along with their related seas.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MS.NAME, MS.AREA, MS.DEPTH, MM.SEA2 FROM MONDIAL_SEA MS JOIN MONDIAL_MERGESWITH MM ON MS.NAME = MM.SEA1

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which seas have the largest area among those listed?
interactions.intention: Find the seas with the largest area from the previously mentioned ones.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, AREA FROM MONDIAL_SEA WHERE AREA = (SELECT MAX(AREA) FROM MONDIAL_SEA)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the provinces of countries that border the largest sea?
interactions.intention: Get the provinces of countries bordering the largest sea.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MGS.PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_SEA MGS JOIN MONDIAL_SEA MS ON MGS.SEA = MS.NAME WHERE MS.AREA = (SELECT MAX(AREA) FROM MONDIAL_SEA)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the names of all deserts listed in the database?
interactions.intention: List all deserts.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DESERT FROM MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you find the government types of the countries where these deserts are located?
interactions.intention: Find the government types of the countries where the deserts are located.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MG.DESERT, MP.GOVERNMENT FROM MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT MG JOIN MONDIAL_POLITICS MP ON MG.COUNTRY=MP.COUNTRY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which desert appears the most in a single province?
interactions.intention: Find the desert that appears the most in a single province.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DESERT, PROVINCE, COUNT(*) AS FREQUENCY FROM MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT GROUP BY DESERT, PROVINCE ORDER BY FREQUENCY DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the different languages spoken in each country, and how prevalent are they?
interactions.intention: Find the list of languages spoken in each country along with their prevalence.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNTRY, NAME, PERCENTAGE FROM MONDIAL_LANGUAGE

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you show me how the population growth links with the languages spoken in the same country?
interactions.intention: Find the population growth of countries along with the languages spoken in those countries.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT ML.COUNTRY, ML.NAME, MP.POPULATION_GROWTH FROM MONDIAL_LANGUAGE ML JOIN MONDIAL_POPULATION MP ON ML.COUNTRY = MP.COUNTRY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: How does the primary religion of a country correlate with its population growth and languages?
interactions.intention: Find the primary religion, population growth, and languages spoken in each country.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT ML.COUNTRY, MR.NAME AS RELIGION, MP.POPULATION_GROWTH, ML.NAME AS LANGUAGE FROM MONDIAL_LANGUAGE ML JOIN MONDIAL_POPULATION MP ON ML.COUNTRY = MP.COUNTRY JOIN MONDIAL_RELIGION MR ON ML.COUNTRY = MR.COUNTRY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the latitude and longitude of airports in the Czech Republic?
interactions.intention: Find the latitude and longitude of airports located in the Czech Republic.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT LATITUDE, LONGITUDE FROM MONDIAL_AIRPORT WHERE COUNTRY = 'CZ'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which of these airports are at an elevation above 500 meters?
interactions.intention: Find airports in the Czech Republic at an elevation above 500 meters.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME FROM MONDIAL_AIRPORT WHERE COUNTRY = 'CZ' AND ELEVATION > 500

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: For these airports above 500 meters, which cities are they located in?
interactions.intention: Find the cities where the airports above 500 meters in the Czech Republic are located.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_AIRPORT.NAME, MONDIAL_CITY.NAME FROM MONDIAL_AIRPORT JOIN MONDIAL_CITY ON MONDIAL_AIRPORT.CITY = MONDIAL_CITY.NAME AND MONDIAL_AIRPORT.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_CITY.COUNTRY WHERE MONDIAL_AIRPORT.COUNTRY = 'CZ' AND MONDIAL_AIRPORT.ELEVATION > 500

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the population of provinces in Germany and the cities in those provinces?
interactions.intention: Find the population of provinces in Germany and the population of cities within those provinces.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MP.NAME AS PROVINCE_NAME, MP.POPULATION AS PROVINCE_POPULATION, MCP.CITY AS CITY_NAME, MCP.POPULATION AS CITY_POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_PROVINCE MP JOIN MONDIAL_CITYPOPS MCP ON MP.NAME = MCP.PROVINCE WHERE MP.COUNTRY = 'D';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which continents do these provinces belong to?
interactions.intention: Find the continents that the provinces of Germany belong to.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MC.NAME AS CONTINENT_NAME FROM MONDIAL_CONTINENT MC JOIN MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES ME ON MC.NAME = ME.CONTINENT JOIN MONDIAL_PROVINCE MP ON ME.COUNTRY = MP.COUNTRY WHERE MP.COUNTRY = 'D';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the total population of these cities?
interactions.intention: Calculate the total population of the cities in the previously mentioned provinces.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT SUM(POPULATION) AS TOTAL_CITY_POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_CITYPOPS WHERE COUNTRY = 'D';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the area of the largest desert?
interactions.intention: Find the area of the largest desert.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, AREA FROM MONDIAL_DESERT ORDER BY AREA DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you provide the name and area of all deserts in ascending order of their size?
interactions.intention: List all deserts with their names and areas, sorted by size in ascending order.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, AREA FROM MONDIAL_DESERT ORDER BY AREA ASC

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which countries have deserts listed in the database?
interactions.intention: Find the countries that have deserts based on the database.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT WHERE DESERT IN (SELECT NAME FROM MONDIAL_DESERT)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the lakes along with the countries and provinces where they are located?
interactions.intention: Provide a list of lakes along with the countries and provinces where they are located.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT LAKE, COUNTRY, PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What about lakes in a specific country, say China?
interactions.intention: List all lakes located in China.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT LAKE, COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE WHERE COUNTRY = 'CN'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you also find information about the countries these lakes are in and their political systems?
interactions.intention: Provide information about the countries of the lakes and their political systems.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MGL.LAKE, MP.COUNTRY, MP.GOVERNMENT FROM MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE MGL JOIN MONDIAL_POLITICS MP ON MGL.COUNTRY = MP.COUNTRY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which seas do the rivers flow into?
interactions.intention: Find the seas that the rivers eventually flow into.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MONDIAL_SEA.NAME FROM MONDIAL_GEO_RIVER JOIN MONDIAL_RIVER ON MONDIAL_GEO_RIVER.RIVER = MONDIAL_RIVER.NAME JOIN MONDIAL_SEA ON MONDIAL_RIVER.SEA = MONDIAL_SEA.NAME

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you provide the countries associated with those rivers and seas?
interactions.intention: Find the countries linked to the rivers and seas.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MONDIAL_GEO_RIVER.COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_GEO_RIVER JOIN MONDIAL_RIVER ON MONDIAL_GEO_RIVER.RIVER = MONDIAL_RIVER.NAME JOIN MONDIAL_SEA ON MONDIAL_RIVER.SEA = MONDIAL_SEA.NAME JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_SEA ON MONDIAL_GEO_SEA.SEA = MONDIAL_SEA.NAME

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Out of those, which provinces are found in the dataset?
interactions.intention: List the provinces associated with the countries of those rivers and seas.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_RIVER

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which organizations have member countries listed in the database?
interactions.intention: Find the organizations and their member countries.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_ORGANIZATION.NAME, MONDIAL_ISMEMBER.COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_ISMEMBER JOIN MONDIAL_ORGANIZATION ON MONDIAL_ISMEMBER.ORGANIZATION = MONDIAL_ORGANIZATION.ABBREVIATION

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you show me the languages spoken in the countries that are members of these organizations?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the languages spoken in countries that are members of the organizations.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_LANGUAGE.NAME, MONDIAL_LANGUAGE.COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_LANGUAGE JOIN MONDIAL_ISMEMBER ON MONDIAL_LANGUAGE.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_ISMEMBER.COUNTRY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What religions are predominant in these countries?
interactions.intention: Identify the predominant religions in the countries that are members of the organizations.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_RELIGION.NAME, MONDIAL_RELIGION.PERCENTAGE, MONDIAL_RELIGION.COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_RELIGION JOIN MONDIAL_ISMEMBER ON MONDIAL_RELIGION.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_ISMEMBER.COUNTRY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the names of cities in the Moskovskaya province?
interactions.intention: Find the names of cities in the Moskovskaya province.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME FROM MONDIAL_CITY WHERE PROVINCE = 'Moskovskaya'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you check if these cities have any other names or translations?
interactions.intention: Find if the cities in Moskovskaya province have other names or translations.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MC.NAME, MCO.OTHERNAME FROM MONDIAL_CITY MC JOIN MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME MCO ON MC.NAME = MCO.CITY AND MC.COUNTRY = MCO.COUNTRY AND MC.PROVINCE = MCO.PROVINCE WHERE MC.PROVINCE = 'Moskovskaya'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the population of each of these cities?
interactions.intention: Find the population of cities in Moskovskaya province.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_CITY WHERE PROVINCE = 'Moskovskaya'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the different types of islands available in the database?
interactions.intention: List the different types of islands.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT TYPE FROM MONDIAL_ISLAND

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the elevation of islands of type 'None'?
interactions.intention: Find the elevation of islands with type 'None'.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, ELEVATION FROM MONDIAL_ISLAND WHERE TYPE = 'None'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which mountains are located on the islands where the elevation is above 10 meters?
interactions.intention: Find mountains on islands with elevation above 10 meters.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MOUNTAIN FROM MONDIAL_MOUNTAINONISLAND INNER JOIN MONDIAL_ISLAND ON MONDIAL_ISLAND.NAME = MONDIAL_MOUNTAINONISLAND.ISLAND WHERE MONDIAL_ISLAND.ELEVATION > 10

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which sea borders Albania and what is its name?
interactions.intention: Identify the sea that borders Albania and provide its name.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_GEO_SEA.SEA FROM MONDIAL_COUNTRY JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_SEA ON MONDIAL_COUNTRY.CODE = MONDIAL_GEO_SEA.COUNTRY WHERE MONDIAL_COUNTRY.NAME = 'Albania'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the population of Albania?
interactions.intention: Find out the population of Albania.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_COUNTRY WHERE NAME = 'Albania'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you also tell me the area of Albania?
interactions.intention: Provide the area of Albania.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT AREA FROM MONDIAL_COUNTRY WHERE NAME = 'Albania'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the population of provinces in Germany?
interactions.intention: Find the population of provinces in Germany.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MP.NAME, MP.POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_PROVINCE MP JOIN MONDIAL_CITYPOPS MCP ON MP.NAME = MCP.PROVINCE AND MP.COUNTRY = MCP.COUNTRY WHERE MP.COUNTRY = 'D';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you also include the capital cities of those provinces?
interactions.intention: Find the population and capitals of provinces in Germany.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MP.NAME, MP.POPULATION, MP.CAPITAL FROM MONDIAL_PROVINCE MP JOIN MONDIAL_CITYPOPS MCP ON MP.NAME = MCP.PROVINCE AND MP.COUNTRY = MCP.COUNTRY WHERE MP.COUNTRY = 'D';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Could you add information about the islands these cities are located on, if any?
interactions.intention: Find the population, capitals, and islands of provinces in Germany.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MP.NAME, MP.POPULATION, MP.CAPITAL, ML.ISLAND FROM MONDIAL_PROVINCE MP JOIN MONDIAL_CITYPOPS MCP ON MP.NAME = MCP.PROVINCE AND MP.COUNTRY = MCP.COUNTRY LEFT JOIN MONDIAL_LOCATEDON ML ON MCP.CITY = ML.CITY AND MCP.COUNTRY = ML.COUNTRY WHERE MP.COUNTRY = 'D';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the names of rivers that flow through lakes?
interactions.intention: Find the names of rivers that flow through lakes.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MONDIAL_RIVERTHROUGH.RIVER FROM MONDIAL_RIVERTHROUGH INNER JOIN MONDIAL_LAKE ON MONDIAL_RIVERTHROUGH.LAKE = MONDIAL_LAKE.NAME

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which rivers from the previous list also flow into a sea?
interactions.intention: Find the names of rivers that flow through lakes and also flow into a sea.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MR.RIVER FROM MONDIAL_RIVER MR INNER JOIN MONDIAL_RIVERTHROUGH MRT ON MR.NAME = MRT.RIVER INNER JOIN MONDIAL_LAKE ML ON MRT.LAKE = ML.NAME WHERE MR.SEA IS NOT NULL

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the average length of these rivers?
interactions.intention: Find the average length of rivers that flow through lakes and into a sea.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT AVG(LENGTH) FROM MONDIAL_RIVER WHERE RIVER IN (SELECT DISTINCT MR.RIVER FROM MONDIAL_RIVER MR INNER JOIN MONDIAL_RIVERTHROUGH MRT ON MR.NAME = MRT.RIVER INNER JOIN MONDIAL_LAKE ML ON MRT.LAKE = ML.NAME WHERE MR.SEA IS NOT NULL)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the names of islands and the corresponding provinces where airports are located?
interactions.intention: Find names of islands and their provinces where airports are located.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MONDIAL_GEO_ISLAND.ISLAND, MONDIAL_GEO_ISLAND.PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_AIRPORT JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_ISLAND ON MONDIAL_AIRPORT.ISLAND = MONDIAL_GEO_ISLAND.ISLAND

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which countries do these islands belong to?
interactions.intention: Find the countries to which the previously mentioned islands belong.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MONDIAL_GEO_ISLAND.COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_AIRPORT JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_ISLAND ON MONDIAL_AIRPORT.ISLAND = MONDIAL_GEO_ISLAND.ISLAND

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the types of these islands?
interactions.intention: Find the types of the islands mentioned earlier.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MONDIAL_ISLAND.TYPE FROM MONDIAL_AIRPORT JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_ISLAND ON MONDIAL_AIRPORT.ISLAND = MONDIAL_GEO_ISLAND.ISLAND JOIN MONDIAL_ISLAND ON MONDIAL_ISLAND.NAME = MONDIAL_GEO_ISLAND.ISLAND

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which seas are connected to rivers?
interactions.intention: Find seas that are connected to rivers.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MONDIAL_GEO_SEA.SEA FROM MONDIAL_GEO_SEA JOIN MONDIAL_RIVER ON MONDIAL_GEO_SEA.SEA = MONDIAL_RIVER.SEA

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the countries associated with those seas?
interactions.intention: Find the countries associated with the seas connected to rivers.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MONDIAL_GEO_SEA.COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_GEO_SEA JOIN MONDIAL_RIVER ON MONDIAL_GEO_SEA.SEA = MONDIAL_RIVER.SEA

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What provinces are listed for these seas?
interactions.intention: Find the provinces listed for the previously identified seas.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_SEA

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the total population for the year 2002?
interactions.intention: Find the total population recorded in the year 2002.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT SUM(POPULATION) FROM MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS WHERE YEAR = 2002

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: How does the population in 2012 compare to 2002?
interactions.intention: Compare the population values between the years 2002 and 2012.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT YEAR, POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS WHERE YEAR IN (2002, 2012)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which organizations are associated with countries having population data?
interactions.intention: Find the organizations linked to the countries for which population data is available.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT M2.ORGANIZATION FROM MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS M1 JOIN MONDIAL_ISMEMBER M2 ON M1.COUNTRY = M2.COUNTRY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which mountains are located in the same province as their namesake province?
interactions.intention: Find mountains located in provinces with the same name as the mountain.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MOUNTAIN FROM MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN JOIN MONDIAL_PROVINCE ON MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN.PROVINCE = MONDIAL_PROVINCE.NAME WHERE MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN.PROVINCE = MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN.MOUNTAIN

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Among these mountains, which one is located in the country with the smallest area?
interactions.intention: Find the mountain located in the country with the smallest area among the previously mentioned mountains.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MOUNTAIN FROM MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN JOIN MONDIAL_PROVINCE ON MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_PROVINCE.COUNTRY ORDER BY MONDIAL_PROVINCE.AREA ASC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the elevation of this mountain?
interactions.intention: Find the elevation of the previously mentioned mountain.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_MOUNTAIN.ELEVATION FROM MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN JOIN MONDIAL_MOUNTAIN ON MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN.MOUNTAIN = MONDIAL_MOUNTAIN.NAME WHERE MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN.MOUNTAIN = (SELECT MOUNTAIN FROM MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN JOIN MONDIAL_PROVINCE ON MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_PROVINCE.COUNTRY ORDER BY MONDIAL_PROVINCE.AREA ASC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the names of lakes and their areas that are connected to rivers?
interactions.intention: Find the names and areas of lakes that are connected to rivers.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_LAKE.NAME, MONDIAL_LAKE.AREA FROM MONDIAL_LAKE JOIN MONDIAL_RIVERTHROUGH ON MONDIAL_RIVERTHROUGH.LAKE = MONDIAL_LAKE.NAME;

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which countries do these lakes belong to?
interactions.intention: Find the countries where the previously mentioned lakes are located.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE.LAKE, MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE.COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE JOIN MONDIAL_LAKE ON MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE.LAKE = MONDIAL_LAKE.NAME JOIN MONDIAL_RIVERTHROUGH ON MONDIAL_RIVERTHROUGH.LAKE = MONDIAL_LAKE.NAME;

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: How many lakes are there in each province?
interactions.intention: Count the number of lakes in each province.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE.PROVINCE, COUNT(MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE.LAKE) FROM MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE GROUP BY MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE.PROVINCE;

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which continent has the highest percentage of area covered by countries?
interactions.intention: Find out the continent with the highest percentage of area covered by countries.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT CONTINENT, MAX(PERCENTAGE) AS MAX_PERCENTAGE FROM MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES GROUP BY CONTINENT

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the percentage for all continents?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the percentage of area covered by countries for each continent.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT CONTINENT, PERCENTAGE FROM MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the maximum percentage for Europe?
interactions.intention: Find the maximum percentage of area covered by countries in Europe.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MAX(PERCENTAGE) AS MAX_PERCENTAGE FROM MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES WHERE CONTINENT = 'Europe'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me which islands are located in France and their provinces?
interactions.intention: Find the islands located in France along with their provinces.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT ISLAND, PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ISLAND WHERE COUNTRY = 'France';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What about the islands in Italy? Could you share the provinces as well?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the islands in Italy and their provinces.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT ISLAND, PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ISLAND WHERE COUNTRY = 'Italy';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you now list the islands in Spain along with their provinces?
interactions.intention: Get the islands in Spain and their provinces.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT ISLAND, PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ISLAND WHERE COUNTRY = 'Spain';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you list all rivers and their corresponding countries?
interactions.intention: List all rivers and their respective countries.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT RIVER, COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_GEO_SOURCE

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you sort the rivers alphabetically along with their countries?
interactions.intention: Sort rivers and their respective countries alphabetically by river names.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT RIVER, COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_GEO_SOURCE ORDER BY RIVER ASC

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the rivers and their countries if we filter for rivers that start with the letter 'A'?
interactions.intention: Retrieve rivers and their countries where the river name starts with 'A'.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT RIVER, COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_GEO_SOURCE WHERE RIVER LIKE 'A%'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the names of islands along with the seas they are located in?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the names of islands and the seas they are located in.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT ISLAND, SEA FROM MONDIAL_ISLANDIN

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which islands are listed first?
interactions.intention: Find out the islands listed at the beginning.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT ISLAND, SEA FROM MONDIAL_ISLANDIN ORDER BY ISLAND ASC

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you show the seas associated with the last islands in the list?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the seas associated with the islands listed at the end.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT ISLAND, SEA FROM MONDIAL_ISLANDIN ORDER BY ISLAND DESC

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you list all the cities located near a lake named 'Victoria'?
interactions.intention: Find cities located near Lake Victoria.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT CITY FROM MONDIAL_LOCATED WHERE LAKE = 'Victoria'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What about the cities near 'Superior'?
interactions.intention: Find cities located near Lake Superior.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT CITY FROM MONDIAL_LOCATED WHERE LAKE = 'Superior'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: And are there any cities located near 'Baikal'?
interactions.intention: Find cities located near Lake Baikal.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT CITY FROM MONDIAL_LOCATED WHERE LAKE = 'Baikal'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the provinces along with their associated islands?
interactions.intention: Find the provinces and the islands they are associated with.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT PROVINCE, ISLAND FROM MONDIAL_LOCATEDON

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you sort the provinces and islands alphabetically by province?
interactions.intention: Sort the list of provinces and their associated islands alphabetically by province.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT PROVINCE, ISLAND FROM MONDIAL_LOCATEDON ORDER BY PROVINCE ASC

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which islands are associated with a specific province, say 'California'?
interactions.intention: Find the islands associated with the province 'California'.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT ISLAND FROM MONDIAL_LOCATEDON WHERE PROVINCE = 'California'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the names and elevations of the mountains ordered by their height from tallest to shortest?
interactions.intention: Find the names and elevations of mountains, ordered from tallest to shortest.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, ELEVATION FROM MONDIAL_MOUNTAIN ORDER BY ELEVATION DESC

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you list the top 5 tallest mountains from that list?
interactions.intention: Get the names and elevations of the top 5 tallest mountains.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, ELEVATION FROM MONDIAL_MOUNTAIN ORDER BY ELEVATION DESC FETCH FIRST 5 ROWS ONLY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the second tallest mountain's elevation?
interactions.intention: Find the elevation of the second tallest mountain.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT ELEVATION FROM MONDIAL_MOUNTAIN ORDER BY ELEVATION DESC OFFSET 1 ROW FETCH NEXT 1 ROW ONLY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the names of mountains and the islands they are located on?
interactions.intention: Find the names of mountains and their corresponding islands.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MOUNTAIN, ISLAND FROM MONDIAL_MOUNTAINONISLAND

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What if I want this list sorted by the mountain names?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the names of mountains and their corresponding islands, sorted by mountain names.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MOUNTAIN, ISLAND FROM MONDIAL_MOUNTAINONISLAND ORDER BY MOUNTAIN

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you filter this list to show only islands named 'Greenland'?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the names of mountains and their corresponding islands, but only for islands named 'Greenland'.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MOUNTAIN, ISLAND FROM MONDIAL_MOUNTAINONISLAND WHERE ISLAND = 'Greenland'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you show me the names and abbreviations of organizations?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the names and abbreviations of organizations.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, ABBREVIATION FROM MONDIAL_ORGANIZATION

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Could you order these organizations alphabetically by their names?
interactions.intention: Order the list of organizations alphabetically by their names.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, ABBREVIATION FROM MONDIAL_ORGANIZATION ORDER BY NAME

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the abbreviations of organizations starting with the letter 'U'?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the abbreviations of organizations whose names start with the letter 'U'.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, ABBREVIATION FROM MONDIAL_ORGANIZATION WHERE NAME LIKE 'U%'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me how many countries there are for each type of government?
interactions.intention: Find out the number of countries grouped by their type of government.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_POLITICS.GOVERNMENT, COUNT(*) AS NUM_COUNTRIES FROM MONDIAL_POLITICS GROUP BY MONDIAL_POLITICS.GOVERNMENT;

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which type of government has the most countries?
interactions.intention: Identify the type of government with the highest number of countries.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_POLITICS.GOVERNMENT FROM MONDIAL_POLITICS GROUP BY MONDIAL_POLITICS.GOVERNMENT ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY;

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: And which type of government has the fewest countries?
interactions.intention: Find the type of government with the lowest number of countries.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_POLITICS.GOVERNMENT FROM MONDIAL_POLITICS GROUP BY MONDIAL_POLITICS.GOVERNMENT ORDER BY COUNT(*) ASC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY;

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the average infant mortality rate for each country?
interactions.intention: Find the average infant mortality rate grouped by country.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNTRY, AVG(INFANT_MORTALITY) AS AVG_INFANT_MORTALITY FROM MONDIAL_POPULATION GROUP BY COUNTRY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which country has the highest average infant mortality rate?
interactions.intention: Identify the country with the highest average infant mortality rate.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNTRY, AVG(INFANT_MORTALITY) AS AVG_INFANT_MORTALITY FROM MONDIAL_POPULATION GROUP BY COUNTRY ORDER BY AVG_INFANT_MORTALITY DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: And which country has the lowest average infant mortality rate?
interactions.intention: Identify the country with the lowest average infant mortality rate.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNTRY, AVG(INFANT_MORTALITY) AS AVG_INFANT_MORTALITY FROM MONDIAL_POPULATION GROUP BY COUNTRY ORDER BY AVG_INFANT_MORTALITY ASC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you provide the names, areas, and populations of provinces along with the average area of all provinces?
interactions.intention: Get the names, areas, and populations of provinces and calculate the average area of all provinces.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, AREA, POPULATION, AVG(AREA) AS AVG_AREA FROM MONDIAL_PROVINCE GROUP BY NAME, AREA, POPULATION

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the population of provinces that have an area larger than the average area?
interactions.intention: Find the population of provinces with an area larger than the average area.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_PROVINCE WHERE AREA > (SELECT AVG(AREA) FROM MONDIAL_PROVINCE)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you list the provinces in descending order of their population?
interactions.intention: List all provinces sorted by population in descending order.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, AREA, POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_PROVINCE ORDER BY POPULATION DESC

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you show me the list of provinces along with their alternative names?
interactions.intention: Retrieve a list of provinces along with their alternative names.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT PROVINCE, OTHERNAME FROM MONDIAL_PROVINCEOTHERNAME

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you sort the provinces alphabetically by their alternative names?
interactions.intention: Sort the provinces alphabetically based on their alternative names.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT PROVINCE, OTHERNAME FROM MONDIAL_PROVINCEOTHERNAME ORDER BY OTHERNAME

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which provinces have alternative names starting with the letter 'A'?
interactions.intention: Retrieve provinces whose alternative names start with the letter 'A'.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT PROVINCE, OTHERNAME FROM MONDIAL_PROVINCEOTHERNAME WHERE OTHERNAME LIKE 'A%'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you show the total population for each province?
interactions.intention: Show the total population for each province.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT PROVINCE, SUM(POPULATION) FROM MONDIAL_PROVPOPS GROUP BY PROVINCE

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you sort the provinces by their total population in descending order?
interactions.intention: Sort the provinces by their total population in descending order.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT PROVINCE, SUM(POPULATION) FROM MONDIAL_PROVPOPS GROUP BY PROVINCE ORDER BY SUM(POPULATION) DESC

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the total population for provinces with a population greater than 1 million?
interactions.intention: Show the total population for provinces with a population greater than 1 million.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT PROVINCE, SUM(POPULATION) FROM MONDIAL_PROVPOPS GROUP BY PROVINCE HAVING SUM(POPULATION) > 1000000

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the different religions and their respective percentages?
interactions.intention: Identify the different religions along with their percentages.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, PERCENTAGE FROM MONDIAL_RELIGION

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which religion has the highest percentage?
interactions.intention: Find the religion with the highest percentage.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, PERCENTAGE FROM MONDIAL_RELIGION ORDER BY PERCENTAGE DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the religions excluding the one with the highest percentage?
interactions.intention: List all religions and their percentages except the one with the highest percentage.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, PERCENTAGE FROM MONDIAL_RELIGION WHERE NAME <> (SELECT NAME FROM MONDIAL_RELIGION ORDER BY PERCENTAGE DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the longest rivers?
interactions.intention: List the longest rivers ordered by their length in descending order.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, LENGTH FROM MONDIAL_RIVER ORDER BY LENGTH DESC

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which river is the second longest?
interactions.intention: Find the second longest river.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, LENGTH FROM MONDIAL_RIVER ORDER BY LENGTH DESC OFFSET 1 ROW FETCH NEXT 1 ROW ONLY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: And how about the third longest river?
interactions.intention: Find the third longest river.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, LENGTH FROM MONDIAL_RIVER ORDER BY LENGTH DESC OFFSET 2 ROW FETCH NEXT 1 ROW ONLY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me which lakes a river flows through?
interactions.intention: Find out which lakes are connected to a specific river.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT RIVER, LAKE FROM MONDIAL_RIVERTHROUGH

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you list these rivers and lakes in alphabetical order?
interactions.intention: Sort the rivers and lakes alphabetically.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT RIVER, LAKE FROM MONDIAL_RIVERTHROUGH ORDER BY RIVER, LAKE

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Are there any rivers that do not flow through any lakes?
interactions.intention: Find rivers that are not associated with any lakes.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT RIVER FROM MONDIAL_RIVERTHROUGH WHERE LAKE IS NULL

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the names and areas of the seas?
interactions.intention: Find the names and areas of all seas.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT Name, Area FROM MONDIAL_SEA

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which of these seas is the deepest?
interactions.intention: Identify the deepest sea from the list.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT Name, Area FROM MONDIAL_SEA WHERE Depth = (SELECT MAX(Depth) FROM MONDIAL_SEA)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you rank the seas by their area?
interactions.intention: Sort the seas by their area in descending order.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT Name, Area FROM MONDIAL_SEA ORDER BY Area DESC
